}
//#endregion
//#region src/util/elementOverflow.ts
function Bi(e, t) {
	let n = e.getBoundingClientRect(), r = t.getBoundingClientRect(), i = n.top < r.top, a = n.bottom > r.bottom;
	return i && a ? "both" : i ? "top" : a ? "bottom" : "none";
}
//#endregion
//#region src/util/mergeRefs.ts
function Vi(e) {
	return (t) => {
		e.forEach((e) => {
			typeof e == "function" ? e(t) : e != null && (e.current = t);
		});
	};
}
//#endregion
export { qn as AddBlockButton, Cr as AddButton, kn as AddCommentButton, On as AddCommentButtonInner, ei as AddFileButton, An as AddTiptapCommentButton, ai as AudioBlock, ri as AudioPreview, ii as AudioToExternalHTML, J as BasicTextStyleButton, Jn as BlockColorsItem, Jr as BlockContentWrapper, a as BlockNoteContext, Nr as BlockNoteDefaultUI, Kr as BlockNoteViewEditor, Gr as BlockNoteViewRaw, rn as BlockPopover, Dn as BlockTypeSelect, yr as ColorPickerButton, hn as ColorStyleButton, _ as Comment, m as Comments, t as ComponentsContext, yn as CreateLinkButton, wr as DeleteButton, Hn as DeleteLinkButton, $n as DragHandleButton, Qn as DragHandleMenu, Un as EditLinkButton, _n as EditLinkMenuItems, an as EmbedTab, xi as ExperimentalMobileFormattingToolbarController, vr as ExtendButton, Xr as FigureWithCaption, ni as FileBlockWrapper, bn as FileCaptionButton, xn as FileDeleteButton, Mn as FileDownloadButton, ti as FileNameWithIcon, sn as FilePanel, cn as FilePanelController, Nn as FilePreviewButton, Sn as FileRenameButton, Cn as FileReplaceButton, ee as FloatingComposer, te as FloatingComposerController, b as FloatingThreadController, zn as FormattingToolbar, Vn as FormattingToolbarController, p as GenericPopover, cr as GridSuggestionMenuController, sr as GridSuggestionMenuWrapper, di as ImageBlock, li as ImagePreview, ui as ImageToExternalHTML, $ as InlineContentWrapper, Gn as LinkToolbar, Kn as LinkToolbarController, Q as LinkWithCaption, wn as NestBlockButton, Wn as OpenLinkButton, o as PositionPopover, oi as ReactAudioBlock, si as ReactFileBlock, fi as ReactImageBlock, vi as ReactVideoBlock, Yn as RemoveBlockItem, ci as ResizableFileBlockWrapper, er as SideMenu, tr as SideMenuController, br as SplitButton, gr as SuggestionMenuController, pr as SuggestionMenuWrapper, Sr as TableCellButton, xr as TableCellMenu, Fn as TableCellMergeButton, Zn as TableColumnHeaderItem, kr as TableHandle, Or as TableHandleMenu, Ar as TableHandlesController, Xn as TableRowHeaderItem, Ln as TextAlignButton, g as Thread, Mi as ThreadsSidebar, bi as ToggleWrapper, Tn as UnnestBlockButton, on as UploadTab, _i as VideoBlock, hi as VideoPreview, gi as VideoToExternalHTML, En as blockTypeSelectItems, Z as createReactBlockSpec, Ri as createReactInlineContentSpec, zi as createReactStyleSpec, Bi as elementOverflow, nr as getDefaultReactEmojiPickerItems, hr as getDefaultReactSlashMenuItems, Rn as getFormattingToolbarItems, n as getMountedBoundingClientRectCache, mi as getPageBreakReactSlashMenuItems, ji as getReferenceText, Vi as mergeRefs, Ni as useActiveStyles, i as useBlockNoteContext, c as useBlockNoteEditor, ir as useCloseSuggestionMenuNoItems, s as useComponentsContext, d as useCreateBlockNote, f as useDictionary, Pr as useEditorChange, e as useEditorDOMElement, Pi as useEditorSelectionBoundingBox, Fr as useEditorSelectionChange, l as useEditorState, Ci as useExtendButtonsPositioning, r as useExtension, u as useExtensionState, Ii as useFocusWithin, or as useGridSuggestionMenuKeyboardNavigation, ar as useLoadSuggestionMenuItems, Zr as useOnUploadEnd, Qr as useOnUploadStart, Ir as usePrefersColorScheme, Yr as useResolveUrl, Li as useSelectedBlocks, ur as useSuggestionMenuKeyboardHandler, fr as useSuggestionMenuKeyboardNavigation, Oi as useTableHandlesPositioning, v as useThreads, $r as useUploadLoading, y as useUser, h as useUsers };

//# sourceMappingURL=blocknote-react.js.map
